user.title: Divoom Times Gate
user.description: Pick your device (auto-discovered on your network) or type its IP, then enter the LocalToken shown in the Divoom app under Device settings.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the device, or the LocalToken was rejected. Check the IP and token.

abort.already_configured: This Times Gate is already configured.

screen_0.title: Screen 1
screen_0.description: This screen's content: a single page, or a list of pages that rotate (by each page's 'duration'). See the README for the page schema.

screen_1.title: Screen 2
screen_1.description: This screen's content: a single page, or a list of pages that rotate.

screen_2.title: Screen 3
screen_2.description: This screen's content: a single page, or a list of pages that rotate.

screen_3.title: Screen 4
screen_3.description: This screen's content: a single page, or a list of pages that rotate.

screen_4.title: Screen 5
screen_4.description: This screen's content: a single page, or a list of pages that rotate.

settings.title: Settings & faces
settings.description: Refresh interval, and your favorite device faces ({overall: [...], per_screen: [...]} with name + clock_id) shown in the Display source and Screen selects.
